boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: unapproved clause fallback.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current controls and boundary match; proceed allowed.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains in current source records.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current legal redline approval and clause version match.

final_answer: Current source records close the exact action boundary: the control record confirms current legal redline approval and clause version match, and the policy says execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested boundary. No open blocker remains, so ALLOW is supported.
